summary: Tested Add Team/Athlete roster features and subscription display. Backend: 28/28 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working - Add Team button, Add Athlete buttons in team cards, modals with all expected fields, athlete autocomplete search, athlete photos in roster, Emma's premium subscription showing correctly with no upgrade prompts.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/roster/teams - Creates team with name, age_group, coach_id, stores in club_teams collection
GET /api/roster/athletes/search - Autocomplete search by full_name with regex matching, returns id/name/position/team/photo_url/grad_year
POST /api/roster/teams/{team_name}/add-athlete - Moves existing athlete to team by updating team field
POST /api/roster/teams/{team_name}/invite - Creates new user + athlete record with temp password, assigns to team
AddTeamModal has proper data-testid attributes: add-team-modal, team-name-input, team-age-group-input, team-coach-select, add-team-confirm
AddAthleteModal has mode-search and mode-invite tabs, athlete-search-input for autocomplete, invite-name-input and invite-email-input for new invites
Athlete photos now display via photo_url field in roster (img element with object-cover)
Subscription endpoint returns tier='premium' for Emma with correct limits (-1 = unlimited)
Frontend SubscriptionProvider properly uses auth token dependency to refresh on login
Team cards show 'Add Athlete' button via showAddAthlete prop in Team View
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ teams during backend testing (TEST_Team_*, TEST_InviteTeam_*, TEST_AddAthleteTeam_*) and invited test athlete
context_for_next_testing_agent: Roster team/athlete management fully implemented. Key features: 1) Global Add Team button in roster header opens AddTeamModal with team name, age group, coach select. 2) Add Athlete button appears in each team card (Team View only) opening AddAthleteModal with two tabs - Existing Athlete (autocomplete search) and Invite New (name/email fields). 3) Athletes show photos via photo_url field. 4) Emma has premium subscription with no upgrade prompts. API endpoints: POST /roster/teams, GET /roster/athletes/search, POST /roster/teams/{team}/add-athlete, POST /roster/teams/{team}/invite.
